message:
fix(node): cap all audit_log/events/history Vecs at 4096 with oldest-first eviction

Systematic sweep across all subsystems to bound previously unbounded
Vec collections (audit_log, events, decision_stream, reports, history,
etc.) with a maximum capacity constant and oldest-first eviction.

Each file follows a consistent pattern:
- Add MAX_EVENTS/MAX_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRIES/etc. const (typically 4096)
- Add push_bounded<T>() utility that pushes an item and drains
  overflow from the front
- Replace direct .push() calls with bounded variant, either via
  a private emit_event()/push_audit() helper method or inline

Notable files with additional work beyond mechanical bounding:
- control_plane/control_lane_policy.rs: configurable capacities via
  with_history_capacities() constructor, capacity getters
- repair/proof_carrying_decode.rs: configurable capacity via
  with_audit_log_capacity() constructor, regression tests
- runtime/safe_mode.rs: borrow-checker fix cloning restricted_capabilities
  before iterating to avoid mutable+immutable borrow conflict
- connector/capability_guard.rs: collects profiles.keys() into Vec
  before loop to resolve borrow conflict

Covers connector (~27 files), runtime (~15), security (~12),
tools (~25), vef (~8), control_plane (~6), and remaining subsystems
(policy, migration, federation, registry, storage, supply_chain,
testing, remote, repair, conformance, api).

Tracked by bead bd-1xbr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
